task: Add UI for loading and resuming persisted sessions from %APPDATA%/hive-manager/sessions/
insight: Implemented session loading feature by: 1) Adding resume_session Tauri command that loads PersistedSession from storage and converts to active Session, 2) Adding resumeSession() method to sessions store that invokes the command and updates state, 3) Adding Persisted Sessions section to SessionSidebar with Load buttons, 4) Using list_stored_sessions command to populate persisted sessions list on mount. Key pattern: PersistedAgentInfo stores role as String (e.g., 'Queen', 'Worker(1)') requiring string parsing to reconstruct AgentRole enum.

task: Add tool docs for learnings API
insight: Documenting session-scoped learnings endpoints in the tools directory makes them discoverable alongside worker/planner tools.

task: Migrate storage paths from .ai-docs/ to .hive-manager/{session_id}/lessons/
insight: Session-scoped storage provides true isolation between sessions, enabling multi-project support. Key pattern: create new methods with suffix _session while keeping legacy methods for backward compatibility. Storage should be in %APPDATA% session directory, not in project root to avoid conflicts.

task: Add learnings tool docs + queen tool table entries
insight: Tools directory now documents submit/list/delete learnings and queen tool tables expose them for discovery.

task: Implement DELETE endpoint for session-scoped learnings API
insight: In axum 0.8, multiple .route() calls on the same path with different HTTP methods get merged correctly. The storage layer pattern uses fs::remove_file for deletion and returns the count of deleted entries by pre-reading the JSONL file.

task: Implement DELETE endpoint for learnings API with per-ID deletion
insight: Added id field to Learning struct with serde(default) for backward compat with old JSONL entries. Used temp-file + rename pattern for atomic JSONL rewrite on delete. Both submit handlers now generate UUID and return learning_id in 201 response. DELETE returns 204 No Content on success, 404 if not found.

task: Add E2E session isolation tests and fix Swarm Queen missing learnings section
insight: The Swarm Queen prompt was missing the Learning Curation Protocol section that the Hive Queen already had. Session isolation tests verify learnings dont bleed between sessions - both for POST and DELETE operations. Most other E2E test scenarios were already covered by existing integration tests.

task: Fix path traversal vulnerability on session_id URL parameters
insight: session_id URL parameters need validation just like request body fields. Pattern: create shared validate_session_id() that rejects '..', '/', '\' and call at top of every session-scoped handler. The controller.rs resume_session() already had this check but it wasnt applied to HTTP handlers. Apply validation consistently - dont assume one layer covers it.

task: Fix case-insensitive filtering with HashSet for O(1) keyword lookups
insight: Extract shared filter logic into a helper function (filter_learnings) to avoid duplicating filter closures across handlers. Use to_lowercase() on both sides + HashSet<String> for O(1) keyword matching instead of Vec::contains for O(n). This also eliminates the code duplication between list_learnings and list_learnings_for_session.

task: Fix documentation/validation mismatch in tool file templates
insight: Tool documentation strings embedded in controller.rs prompt templates can easily drift from handler validation. The submit-learning.md tool file documented outcome values 'discovery|pattern|convention|architecture|failure' while the handler only accepted 'success|partial|failed'. Always update embedded docs when changing validation rules. Workers reading stale tool docs will get 400 errors.

task: Use tempfile crate NamedTempFile for atomic writes
insight: NamedTempFile::new_in() + persist() is cleaner than manual temp file + fs::rename. Benefits: unique filenames prevent races, auto-cleanup on drop if process crashes before persist. Must move tempfile from [dev-dependencies] to [dependencies] in Cargo.toml when using in production code.

task: Fix non-deterministic IDs for legacy JSONL entries using UUID v5
insight: serde(default) with Uuid::new_v4() generates random IDs on every deserialization, breaking delete-by-id for legacy entries. Fix: use Uuid::new_v5(NAMESPACE_DNS, content.as_bytes()) for content-based deterministic hashing. Pattern: generate_learning_id() returns empty string as sentinel, read paths use stable_learning_id() to assign content-based hash when id is empty. Requires uuid v5 feature in Cargo.toml.

task: Update .ai-docs references to session-scoped paths in prompt templates
insight: When migrating storage from project-scoped (.ai-docs/) to session-scoped (.hive-manager/{session_id}/lessons/), ALL documentation in prompt templates must be updated too. The curation protocol referenced .ai-docs/ while the API read from session-scoped paths, creating a disconnect where agents would curate to the wrong location. Both queen and swarm-queen prompts had identical stale references. Also: {id} in format!() strings must be escaped as {{id}}.

task: Multi-agent PR review verification workflow
insight: Spawning 3 verification agents per concern (using different models) with consensus voting works well for PR review triage. All 7 concerns were validated VALID by 3/3 agents. Consolidating 12 raw comments into 7 distinct concerns reduced agent count from 36 to 21. The workflow: fetch comments -> group by concern -> spawn 3 agents each -> categorize by consensus -> implement fixes -> commit. Total: 7 fixes in 5 files, +133/-283 lines (net reduction).

task: Removing redundant unit tests that duplicate integration test coverage
insight: Unit tests that only verify serde deserialization (can JSON parse into struct?) are redundant when integration tests exercise the same validation through the full HTTP handler stack. The 9 removed unit tests (170 lines) only tested struct deserialization, while 30+ integration tests in tests.rs covered every scenario end-to-end with HTTP status code assertions. Exception: serde default value behavior tests have marginal standalone value.

task: Add SessionDefaults to PersistedSession
insight: Added default_cli and default_model to PersistedSession and Session structs to support looking up session configuration in HTTP handlers. Used #[serde(default)] for backward compatibility with existing persisted sessions.

task: Update HTTP Handler Defaults to Use Session Defaults
insight: Successfully removed all hardcoded claude/opus defaults from HTTP handlers. Added model field to AddWorkerRequest to support model overrides. cargo check passed.

task: Security hardening - add CLI allowlist and session ID validation
insight: Successfully added shared validation functions to mod.rs using ApiError return type. Applied session_id validation to 6 handlers and CLI validation to 2 handlers. VALID_CLIS must match default_config() in storage/mod.rs.

task: Parameterize tool generators and prompt quick references to use session-configured CLI
insight: When injecting CLI values into format! raw strings that embed JSON, keep literal JSON braces as {{ }} and use {default_cli}/{cli} placeholders only where substitution is needed to avoid format! errors.

task: Code review of all changes for Issue #20 (model consistency)
insight: When multiple workers add session default CLI lookups, redundant lock acquisitions accumulate. Reuse the first lookup result instead of re-fetching from the controller. Also, use session.default_cli field directly rather than searching through agents for the Queen CLI.

task: Integration testing and final verification for model consistency issue
insight: When testing HTTP handlers that spawn PTY sessions (add_worker), test validation logic (400 responses) rather than full flow since PTY spawn fails in test env. Use assert_ne!(BAD_REQUEST) to prove valid CLIs pass validation even when downstream fails. PersistedSession serde defaults can be tested as pure unit tests within http/tests.rs.

task: Convert solo mode model selector from text input to dropdown
insight: Converted the model selector in solo mode from a text input to a dropdown menu that dynamically shows appropriate model options based on the selected CLI. This improves UX by providing clear options and preventing invalid model selections.

issue_claimed: handleCloseSession uses reactive $activeSession.id at confirm time, allowing wrong session to be closed if active session changes while modal is open
learnings: Confirmation modals for destructive actions must capture the target entity ID when opened, not when confirmed
Svelte reactive stores ($activeSession) can change between modal open and confirm - never read store at confirm time for the action target
SessionSidebar already had the correct pattern (string|null state) - StatusPanel was inconsistent

issue_claimed: parent_id not validated as Evaluator role; worker index silently defaults to 1
learnings: Always validate role/type of referenced entities, not just existence
Extract structured data from return values (AgentInfo.role) rather than parsing string IDs
Silent fallbacks (unwrap_or) mask internal bugs - fail closed instead

insight: Solo mode was missing evaluator fields in the payload and the UI selector was hidden. Fixed by updating SoloLaunchConfig and LaunchDialog.svelte.
task: Solo launch payload fix

insight: Use session.json mtime plus the last synced serialized snapshot as the dirty check: only hot-reload disk state into memory when the current in-memory persisted view still matches the last synced snapshot. That prevents stale disk writes from clobbering newer in-memory state while still reconciling clean external updates.
task: Task 4 simplify/schema foundation

insight: The milestone-ready watcher event was already emitted but never consumed; wiring it to SessionController and treating dead evaluators as stale IDs inside launch_evaluator is enough to support safe respawn without changing watcher semantics. For worker commit enforcement, comparing the worker worktree HEAD against the resolved spawn base gives a reliable commit/no-commit signal even before a dedicated completion API exists.
task: Add qa/verdict control-plane endpoint, worker commit gate, and evaluator respawn hook

insight: Tauri icon CLI regenerates all platform icons including new android/ios directories; heartbeatStore can compute staleness client-side from timestamp using a 3min threshold without new polling.
task: Icon regeneration and QA worker staleness indicator

insight: Created CompletionBlockedError struct for structured 409 responses with current_state, unblock_paths, remaining_quiescence_seconds. This pattern can be reused for other blocked-state errors to provide actionable guidance to clients.
task: Update prompts and enrich 409 response for QA state machine

insight: The new QA staleness UI must parse GET /api/sessions/active as { sessions: [...] } and read last_activity; treating the payload as an array/single session and reading timestamp/last_update leaves staleAgents empty even when the backend reports aged QA worker heartbeats.
task: Review worker-1, worker-3, worker-4, and worker-5 branches for QA verdict control plane readiness

insight: GET /api/sessions/active returns {sessions:[...]} with ActiveAgentInfo fields {id,last_activity}. Frontend store was parsing as array|object and reading timestamp/last_update - both wrong. Fix: parse data.sessions, find by id (fallback first if only one), read agent.last_activity only; treat missing last_activity as stale.
task: Resolve BLOCKER: QA staleness store wired to wrong payload shape

insight: In isolated worker git worktrees, shared session artifacts under D:\Code Projects\hive-manager\.hive-manager\{session_id}\... can sit outside the worktree git toplevel; when a task requires both a shared handoff file and a branch commit, mirror the tracked artifact inside the worktree and copy it to the shared session path for direct consumption.
task: Reconcile PR #98 review findings into a unified prioritized fix list

insight: Heartbeat UI state should only populate from an exact session match, and blank or invalid last_activity values should be treated as not-yet-heartbeated rather than stale to avoid false QA stale badges and cross-session leakage.
task: Fix heartbeat UI session matching/staleness logic and document both completion gate variants in prompt templates

insight: For session hot-reload, an mtime precheck plus a cached persisted-session hash avoids repeated full-JSON dirty checks and lets the controller re-verify cleanliness under the write lock before applying refreshed storage data. For async session/evaluator handlers, push synchronous git HEAD resolution and peer-file writes onto spawn_blocking to keep runtime threads free.
task: Storage/runtime robustness: hot-reload refresh guards, bounded session refresh, and spawn_blocking for sync git/FS

insight: Persisting a worker branch's creation-time base SHA on the agent avoids false-positive commit gating when project HEAD moves later; the same controller mutation can also atomically persist evaluator commit_sha with a QA verdict so handlers do not need follow-up writes or string-based error classification.
task: Fix QA items 4+1+3: stable worker base SHA, atomic verdict persistence, typed completion errors
